title: Croatian Shrimp Fritters
description: Delicious and crispy fritters filled with shrimp and spices, perfect for a quick snack or light meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine shrimp, breadcrumbs, onion, egg, paprika, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
Heat about 1/2 inch of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop the shrimp mixture into the oil, making sure not to overcrowd the skillet.
Fry the fritters for about 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and serve hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
Dust the fritters with flour before frying for an extra crispy coating.
If desired, add some gooey cheese on top of the fritters before serving for an extra burst of flavor.
For an extra smoky flavor, sprinkle some smoked paprika on top of the fritters before serving.
